<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:lvc="clr-namespace:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF;assembly=LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF"
        Title="용접 모니터 대시보드"
        Width="1024" Height="768"
        MinWidth="1024" MinHeight="768"
        MaxWidth="1024" MaxHeight="768"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}">

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Header Bar -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
                BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1"
                Padding="12,6">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- Title + JIG Info -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <TextBlock Text="WeldMonitor V2" FontSize="16" FontWeight="Bold"
                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Margin="0,0,20,0"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="JIG:" FontSize="12" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="HeaderJigId" Text="---" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"
                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,16,0"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="품번:" FontSize="12" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                    <TextBlock x:Name="HeaderPartNo" Text="---" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"
                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Reset / Start / Stop Buttons -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <Button x:Name="ResetButton" Width="70" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
                            Click="BtnReset_Click">
                        <Button.Template>
                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#2D2D3D" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </Border>
                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#3D3D55"/>
                                    </Trigger>
                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            </ControlTemplate>
                        </Button.Template>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="↺" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"
                                       FontSize="14" Margin="0,0,4,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="리셋" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"
                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>
                    <Button x:Name="StartButton" Width="90" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
                            Margin="6,0,0,0" Click="BtnStart_Click">
                        <Button.Template>
                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#1A3D2E" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </Border>
                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#22563B"/>
                                    </Trigger>
                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            </ControlTemplate>
                        </Button.Template>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="▶" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
                                       FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,6,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="검사 시작" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>
                    <Button x:Name="StopButton" Width="70" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
                            Margin="6,0,0,0" Click="BtnStop_Click" IsEnabled="False">
                        <Button.Template>
                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#3B1818" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </Border>
                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#5B2020"/>
                                    </Trigger>
                                    <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Opacity" Value="0.4"/>
                                    </Trigger>
                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            </ControlTemplate>
                        </Button.Template>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="■" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"
                                       FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,6,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="중지" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"
                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Body -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="68"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- Left Sidebar -->
            <Border Grid.Column="0" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
                <DockPanel>
                    <!-- Navigation: 설정-지그-시퀀스-이미지-검색-점검-작업표준-종료 -->
                    <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Top" Margin="4,6">
                        <!-- 설정 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="환경설정" Click="BtnConfig_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M12 6V4m0 2a2 2 0 100 4m0-4a2 2 0 110 4m-6 8a2 2 0 100-4m0 4a2 2 0 110-4m0 4v2m0-6V4m6 6v10m6-2a2 2 0 100-4m0 4a2 2 0 110-4m0 4v2m0-6V4"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="설정" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- 지그 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="JIG 관리" Click="BtnJig_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M4 4h6v6H4V4zm10 0h6v6h-6V4zM4 14h6v6H4v-6zm10 0h6v6h-6v-6z"
                                      Fill="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="지그" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- 시퀀스 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="시퀀스 관리" Click="BtnSeq_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M4 6h16M4 10h16M4 14h16M4 18h16"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="시퀀스" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- 이미지 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="이미지 설정" Click="BtnImageSet_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M4 16l4.586-4.586a2 2 0 012.828 0L16 16m-2-2l1.586-1.586a2 2 0 012.828 0L20 14m-6-6h.01M6 20h12a2 2 0 002-2V6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2z"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="이미지" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- 검색 (RAW DATA included inside) -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="검사 결과 검색" Click="BtnSearch_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="검색" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- 일상점검 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="일상점검" Click="BtnDailyCheck_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M9 5H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2h-2M9 5a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2M9 5a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2m-6 9l2 2 4-4"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="점검" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- 작업표준 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="작업표준" Click="BtnWorkStd_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M9 12h6m-6 4h6m2 5H7a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h5.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l5.414 5.414a1 1 0 01.293.707V19a2 2 0 01-2 2z"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="작업표준" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- PLC 모니터 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="PLC 신호 모니터" Click="BtnPlcMonitor_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M9 3v2m6-2v2M9 19v2m6-2v2M3 9h2m-2 6h2m14-6h2m-2 6h2M7 19h10a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2zM9 9h6v6H9V9z"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="PLC" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- 로그 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="이력 로그" Click="BtnLog_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M4 6h16M4 10h16M4 14h10M4 18h8"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="로그" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <!-- 종료 -->
                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
                                ToolTip="프로그램 종료" Click="BtnExit_Click">
                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                <Path Data="M17 16l4-4m0 0l-4-4m4 4H7m6 4v1a3 3 0 01-3 3H6a3 3 0 01-3-3V7a3 3 0 013-3h4a3 3 0 013 3v1"
                                      Stroke="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="종료" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"
                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- Device Status + LEDs -->
                    <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Margin="4,8" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                        <!-- Arduino Status -->
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                            <Ellipse x:Name="ArduinoLed" Width="8" Height="8" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                                <Ellipse.Fill>
                                    <SolidColorBrush Color="#EF4444"/>
                                </Ellipse.Fill>
                            </Ellipse>
                            <TextBlock Text="ARD" FontSize="9"
                                       Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <!-- PLC Status -->
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,6">
                            <Ellipse x:Name="PlcLed" Width="8" Height="8" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                                <Ellipse.Fill>
                                    <SolidColorBrush Color="#EF4444"/>
                                </Ellipse.Fill>
                            </Ellipse>
                            <TextBlock Text="PLC" FontSize="9"
                                       Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <!-- System OK LED -->
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="0,4">
                            <Ellipse.Fill>
                                <RadialGradientBrush>
                                    <GradientStop Color="#22C55E" Offset="0"/>
                                    <GradientStop Color="#16A34A" Offset="1"/>
                                </RadialGradientBrush>
                            </Ellipse.Fill>
                            <Ellipse.Effect>
                                <DropShadowEffect Color="#22C55E" BlurRadius="8" ShadowDepth="0" Opacity="0.6"/>
                            </Ellipse.Effect>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <!-- Alert LED (Amber pulsing) -->
                        <Ellipse x:Name="AlertLed" Width="10" Height="10" Margin="0,4">
                            <Ellipse.Fill>
                                <RadialGradientBrush>
                                    <GradientStop Color="#F59E0B" Offset="0"/>
                                    <GradientStop Color="#D97706" Offset="1"/>
                                </RadialGradientBrush>
                            </Ellipse.Fill>
                            <Ellipse.Effect>
                                <DropShadowEffect Color="#F59E0B" BlurRadius="8" ShadowDepth="0" Opacity="0.6"/>
                            </Ellipse.Effect>
                            <Ellipse.Triggers>
                                <EventTrigger RoutedEvent="Loaded">
                                    <BeginStoryboard>
                                        <Storyboard RepeatBehavior="Forever">
                                            <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="Opacity"
                                                             From="1" To="0.3" Duration="0:0:0.8" AutoReverse="True"/>
                                        </Storyboard>
                                    </BeginStoryboard>
                                </EventTrigger>
                            </Ellipse.Triggers>
                        </Ellipse>
                    </StackPanel>
                </DockPanel>
            </Border>

            <!-- Main Content -->
            <Grid Grid.Column="1" Margin="12">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="180"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <!-- KPI Bar -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="16" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- CURRENT -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <Border Background="#1E3A5F" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,12,0">
                            <Path Data="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" Fill="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"
                                  Width="24" Height="24" Stretch="Uniform"/>
                        </Border>
                        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center">
                            <TextBlock Text="전류" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"/>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                <TextBlock x:Name="CurrentValue" Text="245.3" Style="{StaticResource KPIValueStyle}"
                                           Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="A" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"
                                           FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Margin="4,0,0,4"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- VOLTAGE -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <Border Background="#1A3D2E" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,12,0">
                            <Path Data="M12 3v1m0 16v1m9-9h-1M4 12H3m15.364 6.364l-.707-.707M6.343 6.343l-.707-.707m12.728 0l-.707.707M6.343 17.657l-.707.707M16 12a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0z"
                                  Stroke="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5"
                                  Width="24" Height="24" Stretch="Uniform"/>
                        </Border>
                        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center">
                            <TextBlock Text="전압" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"/>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                <TextBlock x:Name="VoltageValue" Text="23.1" Style="{StaticResource KPIValueStyle}"
                                           Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="V" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"
                                           FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Margin="4,0,0,4"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- GAS FLOW -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <Border Background="#3D2E1A" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,12,0">
                            <Path Data="M17.657 18.657A8 8 0 016.343 7.343S7 9 9 10c0-2 .5-5 2.986-7C14 5 16.09 5.777 17.656 7.343A7.975 7.975 0 0120 13a7.975 7.975 0 01-2.343 5.657z"
                                  Fill="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}" Width="24" Height="24" Stretch="Uniform"/>
                        </Border>
                        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center">
                            <TextBlock Text="유량" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"/>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                <TextBlock x:Name="FlowValue" Text="18.2" Style="{StaticResource KPIValueStyle}"
                                           Foreground="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="L/min" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"
                                           FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Margin="4,0,0,4"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- Status Badges -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <Border Style="{StaticResource StatusBadgeStyle}" Background="#1E3A5F" Margin="4,0">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="JIG" FontSize="10" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock x:Name="JigValue" Text="A-01" FontSize="14" Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                        <Border Style="{StaticResource StatusBadgeStyle}" Background="#2D2D2D" Margin="4,0">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="타점" FontSize="10" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock x:Name="StepValue" Text="3/8" FontSize="14" Foreground="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                        <Border Style="{StaticResource StatusBadgeStyle}" Background="#1A3D2E" Margin="4,0">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="결과" FontSize="10" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                <TextBlock x:Name="ResultValue" Text="OK" FontSize="14" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- Middle Section: Product Image + Charts -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="4*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="5*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- Product Image Panel -->
                <Border Grid.Column="0" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="12" Margin="0,0,12,0">
                    <DockPanel>
                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="제품 이미지" FontSize="12"
                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                        <Grid Background="#252525" ClipToBounds="True">
                            <Image x:Name="ProductImage" Stretch="Uniform"/>
                            <Canvas x:Name="JigCanvas" ClipToBounds="True"
                                    SizeChanged="JigCanvas_SizeChanged"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </DockPanel>
                </Border>

                <!-- Charts Panel (no side labels) -->
                <Border Grid.Column="1" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="8">
                    <Grid>
                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                        <!-- AMP Chart -->
                        <lvc:CartesianChart Grid.Row="0" x:Name="AmpChart"
                                            TooltipPosition="Hidden" LegendPosition="Hidden" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>

                        <!-- VOLT Chart -->
                        <lvc:CartesianChart Grid.Row="1" x:Name="VoltChart"
                                            TooltipPosition="Hidden" LegendPosition="Hidden" Margin="0,2"/>

                        <!-- FLOW Chart -->
                        <lvc:CartesianChart Grid.Row="2" x:Name="FlowChart"
                                            TooltipPosition="Hidden" LegendPosition="Hidden" Margin="0,4,0,0"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>
            </Grid>

            <!-- Data Table -->
            <Border Grid.Row="2" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="12">
                <DockPanel>
                    <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="검사 결과" FontSize="12"
                               Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                    <DataGrid x:Name="ResultsDataGrid" AutoGenerateColumns="False"
                              CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False" IsReadOnly="True"
                              SelectionMode="Single" SelectionUnit="FullRow">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="포인트" Binding="{Binding Point}" Width="60"/>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="결과" Width="70">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="8,2" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                                                Background="{Binding ResultBackground}">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Result}" FontSize="11" FontWeight="SemiBold"
                                                       Foreground="{Binding ResultForeground}"/>
                                        </Border>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP AVG" Binding="{Binding AmpAvg, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP MAX" Binding="{Binding AmpMax, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP MIN" Binding="{Binding AmpMin, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="VOLT AVG" Binding="{Binding VoltAvg, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="FLOW AVG" Binding="{Binding FlowAvg, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="시간" Binding="{Binding Time}" Width="*"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                </DockPanel>
            </Border>
        </Grid>
        </Grid>
    </Grid>
</Window>

<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.SeqWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="시퀀스 관리"
        Width="1024" Height="768"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}"
        ResizeMode="CanResize">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- Standard button style -->
        <Style x:Key="ToolbarButtonStyle" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                CornerRadius="6" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#555555"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- Primary button style -->
        <Style x:Key="PrimaryButtonStyle" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource ToolbarButtonStyle}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E3A5F"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                CornerRadius="6" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#264F7F"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#2E5F9F"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- Amp column header (blue) -->
        <Style x:Key="AmpHeaderStyle" TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader"
               BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type DataGridColumnHeader}}">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- Volt column header (green) -->
        <Style x:Key="VoltHeaderStyle" TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader"
               BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type DataGridColumnHeader}}">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- Flow column header (orange) -->
        <Style x:Key="FlowHeaderStyle" TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader"
               BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type DataGridColumnHeader}}">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- ComboBox dark style for Type columns -->
        <Style x:Key="TypeComboStyle" TargetType="ComboBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="16">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Title -->
        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="시퀀스 관리"
                   FontSize="20" FontWeight="Bold"
                   Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"
                   Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

        <!-- JIG Selector -->
        <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,12">
            <TextBlock Text="JIG:" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0" FontSize="13"/>
            <ComboBox x:Name="JigComboBox"
                      Width="280" Height="28"
                      SelectionChanged="OnJigSelectionChanged"
                      DisplayMemberPath="DisplayText"/>

            <TextBlock Text="앞 버림(%)" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="24,0,6,0" FontSize="12"/>
            <TextBox x:Name="txtStartSector" Width="50" Height="28"
                     Background="#252525" Foreground="White" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                     Padding="4,3" FontSize="12" CaretBrush="White" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>

            <TextBlock Text="뒤 버림(%)" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,6,0" FontSize="12"/>
            <TextBox x:Name="txtEndSector" Width="50" Height="28"
                     Background="#252525" Foreground="White" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                     Padding="4,3" FontSize="12" CaretBrush="White" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>

            <TextBlock Text="선 굵기" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,6,0" FontSize="12"/>
            <TextBox x:Name="txtGraphWidth" Width="50" Height="28"
                     Background="#252525" Foreground="White" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                     Padding="4,3" FontSize="12" CaretBrush="White" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
        </StackPanel>

        <!-- DataGrid with grouped headers -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="0">
            <DockPanel>
                <!-- Group header bar -->
                <Grid DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="26" Background="#1A1A1A">
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="44"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="292"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="292"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="292"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="50"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="No" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                               HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                    <Border Grid.Column="1" BorderBrush="#333" BorderThickness="1,0,1,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="전류 (A)" Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    </Border>
                    <Border Grid.Column="2" BorderBrush="#333" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="전압 (V)" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    </Border>
                    <Border Grid.Column="3" BorderBrush="#333" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="유량 (L)" Foreground="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="4" Text="기타" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                               HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                </Grid>

                <!-- DataGrid -->
                <DataGrid x:Name="SeqDataGrid"
                          AutoGenerateColumns="False"
                          CanUserAddRows="False"
                          CanUserDeleteRows="False"
                          CanUserSortColumns="False"
                          SelectionMode="Single"
                          SelectionUnit="FullRow"
                          RowHeight="34"
                          VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                          HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="No" Width="44"
                                            Binding="{Binding PointId}" IsReadOnly="True"/>

                        <!-- Amp columns (blue header) -->
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="기준최소" Width="77"
                                            Binding="{Binding Amp.Min, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource AmpHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="기준최대" Width="77"
                                            Binding="{Binding Amp.Max, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource AmpHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="보정" Width="66"
                                            Binding="{Binding Amp.Tol, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource AmpHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="판정타입" Width="72"
                                                HeaderStyle="{StaticResource AmpHeaderStyle}">
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Amp.Type}" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellEditingTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding Amp.Type, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                              Style="{StaticResource TypeComboStyle}">
                                        <ComboBox.Items>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">평균</sys:String>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">최대</sys:String>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">최소</sys:String>
                                        </ComboBox.Items>
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellEditingTemplate>
                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>

                        <!-- Volt columns (green header) -->
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="기준최소" Width="77"
                                            Binding="{Binding Volt.Min, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource VoltHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="기준최대" Width="77"
                                            Binding="{Binding Volt.Max, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource VoltHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="보정" Width="66"
                                            Binding="{Binding Volt.Tol, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource VoltHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="판정타입" Width="72"
                                                HeaderStyle="{StaticResource VoltHeaderStyle}">
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Volt.Type}" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellEditingTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding Volt.Type, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                              Style="{StaticResource TypeComboStyle}">
                                        <ComboBox.Items>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">평균</sys:String>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">최대</sys:String>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">최소</sys:String>
                                        </ComboBox.Items>
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellEditingTemplate>
                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>

                        <!-- Flow columns (orange header) -->
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="기준최소" Width="77"
                                            Binding="{Binding Flow.Min, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource FlowHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="기준최대" Width="77"
                                            Binding="{Binding Flow.Max, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource FlowHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="보정" Width="66"
                                            Binding="{Binding Flow.Tol, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource FlowHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="판정타입" Width="72"
                                                HeaderStyle="{StaticResource FlowHeaderStyle}">
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Flow.Type}" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellEditingTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <ComboBox SelectedItem="{Binding Flow.Type, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                              Style="{StaticResource TypeComboStyle}">
                                        <ComboBox.Items>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">평균</sys:String>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">최대</sys:String>
                                            <sys:String xmlns:sys="clr-namespace:System;assembly=System.Runtime">최소</sys:String>
                                        </ComboBox.Items>
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellEditingTemplate>
                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>

                        <!-- Pass column -->
                        <DataGridCheckBoxColumn Header="Pass" Width="50"
                                                Binding="{Binding Pass, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"/>
                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                </DataGrid>
            </DockPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- Bottom Toolbar -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,12,0,0">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- Left: JIG info -->
            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                <TextBlock x:Name="JigInfoText"
                           Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                           FontSize="12" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </StackPanel>

            <!-- Right: Action buttons -->
            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right">
                <Button Content="추가" Style="{StaticResource ToolbarButtonStyle}"
                        Click="OnAdd" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <Button Content="삭제" Style="{StaticResource ToolbarButtonStyle}"
                        Click="OnDelete" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <Button Content="복사" Style="{StaticResource ToolbarButtonStyle}"
                        Click="OnCopy" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <Button Content="JIG 적용" Style="{StaticResource PrimaryButtonStyle}"
                        Click="OnApplyToJig" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <Button Content="전체 적용" Style="{StaticResource PrimaryButtonStyle}"
                        Click="OnApplyToAll" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <Button Content="저장" Style="{StaticResource PrimaryButtonStyle}"
                        Click="OnSave" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <Button Content="닫기" Style="{StaticResource ToolbarButtonStyle}"
                        Click="OnClose"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Grid>
    </Grid>
</Window>

<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.ImageSetWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="이미지 설정" Width="1024" Height="768"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}"
        ResizeMode="NoResize">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- Button style for this window -->
        <Style x:Key="WinButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="14,7"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="bd" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                CornerRadius="6" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style x:Key="PrimaryButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource WinButton}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E3A5F"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <DockPanel Margin="16">
        <!-- Title -->
        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="이미지 설정"
                   FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold"
                   Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

        <!-- Bottom buttons -->
        <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Orientation="Horizontal"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,12,0,0">
            <Button Content="크기 전체적용" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                    Click="ApplySizeToAll_Click" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
            <Button Content="저장" Style="{StaticResource PrimaryButton}"
                    Click="SaveButton_Click" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
            <Button Content="닫기" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                    Click="CloseButton_Click"/>
        </StackPanel>

        <!-- Main two-panel layout -->
        <Grid>
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="4*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5*"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- Left panel: Image canvas -->
            <DockPanel Grid.Column="0" Margin="0,0,12,0">
                <!-- Controls below canvas -->
                <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,8,0,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="JIG:" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="JigComboBox" Width="100" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                              SelectionChanged="JigComboBox_SelectionChanged"
                              DisplayMemberPath="JigId"/>
                    <Button Content="이미지 불러오기" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                            Click="LoadImageButton_Click" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                    <Button Content="포인트 추가" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                            Click="AddPointButton_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Canvas area -->
                <Border Background="#252525" CornerRadius="6" ClipToBounds="True">
                    <Canvas x:Name="ImageCanvas"
                            MouseLeftButtonDown="ImageCanvas_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                            MouseMove="ImageCanvas_MouseMove"
                            MouseLeftButtonUp="ImageCanvas_MouseLeftButtonUp"
                            MouseWheel="ImageCanvas_MouseWheel"
                            SizeChanged="ImageCanvas_SizeChanged"/>
                </Border>
            </DockPanel>

            <!-- Right panel: Coordinates table -->
            <DockPanel Grid.Column="1">
                <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="포인트 좌표"
                           FontSize="13" FontWeight="SemiBold"
                           Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                <DataGrid x:Name="PointsDataGrid"
                          AutoGenerateColumns="False"
                          CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False"
                          SelectionMode="Single" SelectionUnit="FullRow"
                          SelectionChanged="PointsDataGrid_SelectionChanged"
                          CellEditEnding="PointsDataGrid_CellEditEnding">
                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Point" Binding="{Binding PointId}" IsReadOnly="True" Width="50"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="PosX" Binding="{Binding PosX, Mode=TwoWay}" Width="55"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="PosY" Binding="{Binding PosY, Mode=TwoWay}" Width="55"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="SizeX" Binding="{Binding SizeX, Mode=TwoWay}" Width="55"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="SizeY" Binding="{Binding SizeY, Mode=TwoWay}" Width="55"/>
                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                </DataGrid>
            </DockPanel>
        </Grid>
    </DockPanel>
</Window>

<Application x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.App"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             Startup="OnAppStartup">
    <Application.Resources>
        <ResourceDictionary>
            <!-- Colors -->
            <Color x:Key="BackgroundColor">#1E1E1E</Color>
            <Color x:Key="CardColor">#2B2B2B</Color>
            <Color x:Key="CardHoverColor">#363636</Color>
            <Color x:Key="BorderColor">#3A3A3A</Color>
            <Color x:Key="TextPrimaryColor">#FFFFFF</Color>
            <Color x:Key="TextSecondaryColor">#9CA3AF</Color>
            <Color x:Key="CurrentBlueColor">#60A5FA</Color>
            <Color x:Key="VoltageGreenColor">#4ADE80</Color>
            <Color x:Key="FlowOrangeColor">#FB923C</Color>
            <Color x:Key="SuccessColor">#22C55E</Color>
            <Color x:Key="ErrorColor">#EF4444</Color>
            <Color x:Key="WarningColor">#F59E0B</Color>

            <!-- Brushes -->
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="BackgroundBrush" Color="{StaticResource BackgroundColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="CardBrush" Color="{StaticResource CardColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="CardHoverBrush" Color="{StaticResource CardHoverColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="BorderBrush" Color="{StaticResource BorderColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="TextPrimaryBrush" Color="{StaticResource TextPrimaryColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="TextSecondaryBrush" Color="{StaticResource TextSecondaryColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="CurrentBlueBrush" Color="{StaticResource CurrentBlueColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="VoltageGreenBrush" Color="{StaticResource VoltageGreenColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="FlowOrangeBrush" Color="{StaticResource FlowOrangeColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="SuccessBrush" Color="{StaticResource SuccessColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="ErrorBrush" Color="{StaticResource ErrorColor}"/>
            <SolidColorBrush x:Key="WarningBrush" Color="{StaticResource WarningColor}"/>

            <!-- Sidebar Button Style -->
            <Style x:Key="SidebarButtonStyle" TargetType="Button">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
                <Setter Property="Width" Value="56"/>
                <Setter Property="Height" Value="50"/>
                <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
                <Setter Property="Template">
                    <Setter.Value>
                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                            <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                    CornerRadius="6" Padding="2,4">
                                <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            </Border>
                            <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                    <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardHoverBrush}"/>
                                </Trigger>
                            </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                        </ControlTemplate>
                    </Setter.Value>
                </Setter>
            </Style>

            <!-- Card Style -->
            <Style x:Key="CardStyle" TargetType="Border">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
                <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="8"/>
            </Style>

            <!-- KPI Value Style -->
            <Style x:Key="KPIValueStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="28"/>
                <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
            </Style>

            <!-- KPI Label Style -->
            <Style x:Key="KPILabelStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
            </Style>

            <!-- Status Badge Style -->
            <Style x:Key="StatusBadgeStyle" TargetType="Border">
                <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="4"/>
                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
            </Style>

            <!-- DataGrid Style -->
            <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="Transparent"/>
                <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#252525"/>
                <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
                <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            </Style>

            <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="11"/>
                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,8"/>
                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,0,1"/>
                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
            </Style>

            <Style TargetType="DataGridCell">
                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,8"/>
                <Setter Property="Template">
                    <Setter.Value>
                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="DataGridCell">
                            <Border Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}">
                                <ContentPresenter VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            </Border>
                        </ControlTemplate>
                    </Setter.Value>
                </Setter>
                <Style.Triggers>
                    <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardHoverBrush}"/>
                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
                    </Trigger>
                </Style.Triggers>
            </Style>

            <!-- ComboBox dark theme -->
            <Style TargetType="ComboBox">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
                <Setter Property="Template">
                    <Setter.Value>
                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="ComboBox">
                            <Grid>
                                <ToggleButton x:Name="ToggleBtn" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                              BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
                                              BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
                                              IsChecked="{Binding IsDropDownOpen, Mode=TwoWay, RelativeSource={RelativeSource TemplatedParent}}"
                                              ClickMode="Press">
                                    <ToggleButton.Template>
                                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="ToggleButton">
                                            <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                                    BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
                                                    BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
                                                    CornerRadius="4" Padding="6,4,20,4">
                                                <Grid>
                                                    <ContentPresenter/>
                                                    <Path Data="M0,0 L4,4 8,0" Fill="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                                                          HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,2,0"/>
                                                </Grid>
                                            </Border>
                                        </ControlTemplate>
                                    </ToggleButton.Template>
                                </ToggleButton>
                                <ContentPresenter IsHitTestVisible="False"
                                                  Content="{TemplateBinding SelectionBoxItem}"
                                                  ContentTemplate="{TemplateBinding SelectionBoxItemTemplate}"
                                                  Margin="8,4,20,4" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                                  HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                                    <ContentPresenter.Resources>
                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
                                        </Style>
                                    </ContentPresenter.Resources>
                                </ContentPresenter>
                                <Popup IsOpen="{TemplateBinding IsDropDownOpen}" Placement="Bottom"
                                       AllowsTransparency="True" Focusable="False" PopupAnimation="Slide">
                                    <Border Background="#2A2A2A" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                                            BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4" Padding="0,4">
                                        <ScrollViewer MaxHeight="200">
                                            <StackPanel IsItemsHost="True"/>
                                        </ScrollViewer>
                                    </Border>
                                </Popup>
                            </Grid>
                        </ControlTemplate>
                    </Setter.Value>
                </Setter>
            </Style>

            <Style TargetType="ComboBoxItem">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
                <Style.Triggers>
                    <Trigger Property="IsHighlighted" Value="True">
                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                    </Trigger>
                    <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E3A5F"/>
                    </Trigger>
                </Style.Triggers>
            </Style>

            <Style TargetType="DataGridRow">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
                <Style.Triggers>
                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource CardHoverBrush}"/>
                    </Trigger>
                </Style.Triggers>
            </Style>
        </ResourceDictionary>
    </Application.Resources>
</Application>

# Screenshot Check Agent

## Task Settings
- subagent_type: screenshot-viewer
- model: sonnet

## Role
Finds the latest screenshot from the `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder, reads it, and analyzes the content to report.

## Actions

1. Find the 1 most recent file in `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder (by modified time)
2. Read the image file using Read tool
3. Analyze the screenshot content and report to the user

## Analysis Items
- Summarize visible content on screen
- Highlight any error/warning messages
- Explain related context if code is visible
- Identify UI elements

## Rules
- If no file found, report "No screenshot found"
- After analysis, advise "Let me know if any further action is needed"

스크린샷을 확인했습니다. 두 가지 문제가 보입니다:

1. **시퀀스 창 JIG 콤보박스**: `WeldMonitorV2.JigComboItem`이라는 타입명이 표시됨 → `DisplayMemberPath`가 제대로 동작하지 않는 문제
2. **이미지 창 JIG 콤보박스**: 같은 문제일 가능성 높음 (`DisplayMemberPath="JigId"`로 int 표시)

원인은 App.xaml의 커스텀 ComboBox 템플릿에서 `ContentPresenter`가 `SelectionBoxItem`만 바인딩하고 `ContentStringFormat`과 `DisplayMemberPath`를 제대로 처리하지 못하는 것입니다.

`JigComboItem`에 `ToString()` 오버라이드를 추가하고, ImageSetWindow의 ComboBox도 수정하겠습니다.
