<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.SeqWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="시퀀스 관리"
        Width="1024" Height="768"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}"
        ResizeMode="CanResize">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- Standard button style -->
        <Style x:Key="ToolbarButtonStyle" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                CornerRadius="6" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#555555"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- Primary button style -->
        <Style x:Key="PrimaryButtonStyle" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource ToolbarButtonStyle}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E3A5F"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                CornerRadius="6" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#264F7F"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#2E5F9F"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- Amp column header (blue) -->
        <Style x:Key="AmpHeaderStyle" TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader"
               BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type DataGridColumnHeader}}">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- Volt column header (green) -->
        <Style x:Key="VoltHeaderStyle" TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader"
               BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type DataGridColumnHeader}}">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- Flow column header (orange) -->
        <Style x:Key="FlowHeaderStyle" TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader"
               BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type DataGridColumnHeader}}">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- ComboBox dark style for Type columns -->
        <Style x:Key="TypeComboStyle" TargetType="ComboBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="16">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Title -->
        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="시퀀스 관리"
                   FontSize="20" FontWeight="Bold"
                   Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"
                   Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

        <!-- JIG Selector -->
        <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,12">
            <TextBlock Text="JIG:" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0" FontSize="13"/>
            <ComboBox x:Name="JigComboBox"
                      Width="280" Height="28"
                      SelectionChanged="OnJigSelectionChanged"
                      DisplayMemberPath="DisplayText"/>

            <TextBlock Text="앞 버림(%)" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="24,0,6,0" FontSize="12"/>
            <TextBox x:Name="txtStartSector" Width="50" Height="28"
                     Background="#252525" Foreground="White" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                     Padding="4,3" FontSize="12" CaretBrush="White" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>

            <TextBlock Text="뒤 버림(%)" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,6,0" FontSize="12"/>
            <TextBox x:Name="txtEndSector" Width="50" Height="28"
                     Background="#252525" Foreground="White" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                     Padding="4,3" FontSize="12" CaretBrush="White" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>

            <TextBlock Text="선 굵기" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,6,0" FontSize="12"/>
            <TextBox x:Name="txtGraphWidth" Width="50" Height="28"
                     Background="#252525" Foreground="White" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                     Padding="4,3" FontSize="12" CaretBrush="White" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
        </StackPanel>

        <!-- DataGrid with grouped headers -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="0">
            <DockPanel>
                <!-- Group header bar -->
                <Grid DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="26" Background="#1A1A1A">
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="44"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="292"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="292"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="292"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="50"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="No" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                               HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                    <Border Grid.Column="1" BorderBrush="#333" BorderThickness="1,0,1,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="전류 (A)" Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    </Border>
                    <Border Grid.Column="2" BorderBrush="#333" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="전압 (V)" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    </Border>
                    <Border Grid.Column="3" BorderBrush="#333" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="유량 (L)" Foreground="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBlock Grid.Column="4" Text="기타" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                               HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                </Grid>

                <!-- DataGrid -->
                <DataGrid x:Name="SeqDataGrid"
                          AutoGenerateColumns="False"
                          CanUserAddRows="False"
                          CanUserDeleteRows="False"
                          CanUserSortColumns="False"
                          SelectionMode="Single"
                          SelectionUnit="FullRow"
                          RowHeight="34"
                          VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                          HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <DataGrid.Columns>

                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource FlowHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="보정" Width="66"
                                            Binding="{Binding Flow.Tol, StringFormat=0.00, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=LostFocus}"
                                            HeaderStyle="{StaticResource FlowHeaderStyle}"/>
                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="판정타입" Width="72"
                                                HeaderStyle="{StaticResource FlowHeaderStyle}">

<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.ImageSetWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="이미지 설정" Width="1024" Height="768"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}"
        ResizeMode="NoResize">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- Button style for this window -->
        <Style x:Key="WinButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="14,7"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="bd" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                CornerRadius="6" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style x:Key="PrimaryButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource WinButton}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E3A5F"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <DockPanel Margin="16">
        <!-- Title -->
        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="이미지 설정"
                   FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold"
                   Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

        <!-- Bottom buttons -->
        <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Orientation="Horizontal"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,12,0,0">
            <Button Content="크기 전체적용" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                    Click="ApplySizeToAll_Click" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
            <Button Content="저장" Style="{StaticResource PrimaryButton}"
                    Click="SaveButton_Click" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
            <Button Content="닫기" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                    Click="CloseButton_Click"/>
        </StackPanel>

        <!-- Main two-panel layout -->
        <Grid>
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="4*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5*"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- Left panel: Image canvas -->
            <DockPanel Grid.Column="0" Margin="0,0,12,0">
                <!-- Controls below canvas -->
                <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,8,0,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="JIG:" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="JigComboBox" Width="100" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                              SelectionChanged="JigComboBox_SelectionChanged"
                              DisplayMemberPath="JigId"/>
                    <Button Content="이미지 불러오기" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                            Click="LoadImageButton_Click" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                    <Button Content="포인트 추가" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                            Click="AddPointButton_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- Canvas area -->
                <Border Background="#252525" CornerRadius="6" ClipToBounds="True">
                    <Canvas x:Name="ImageCanvas"
                            MouseLeftButtonDown="ImageCanvas_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                            MouseMove="ImageCanvas_MouseMove"
                            MouseLeftButtonUp="ImageCanvas_MouseLeftButtonUp"
                            MouseWheel="ImageCanvas_MouseWheel"
                            SizeChanged="ImageCanvas_SizeChanged"/>
                </Border>
            </DockPanel>

            <!-- Right panel: Coordinates table -->
            <DockPanel Grid.Column="1">
                <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="포인트 좌표"
                           FontSize="13" FontWeight="SemiBold"
                           Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                <DataGrid x:Name="PointsDataGrid"
                          AutoGenerateColumns="False"
                          CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False"
                          SelectionMode="Single" SelectionUnit="FullRow"
                          SelectionChanged="PointsDataGrid_SelectionChanged"
                          CellEditEnding="PointsDataGrid_CellEditEnding">
                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Point" Binding="{Binding PointId}" IsReadOnly="True" Width="50"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="PosX" Binding="{Binding PosX, Mode=TwoWay}" Width="55"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="PosY" Binding="{Binding PosY, Mode=TwoWay}" Width="55"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="SizeX" Binding="{Binding SizeX, Mode=TwoWay}" Width="55"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="SizeY" Binding="{Binding SizeY, Mode=TwoWay}" Width="55"/>
                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                </DataGrid>
            </DockPanel>
        </Grid>
    </DockPanel>
</Window>

<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.AutoSettingsWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="자동설정" Width="750" Height="620"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}"
        ResizeMode="NoResize">

    <Window.Resources>
        <Style x:Key="WinButton" TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="14,7"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="bd" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                CornerRadius="6" Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                                <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Opacity" Value="0.5"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style x:Key="PrimaryButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource WinButton}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E3A5F"/>
        </Style>
        <Style x:Key="GoldButton" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource WinButton}">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#8B6914"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <DockPanel Margin="16">
        <!-- Title -->
        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="자동설정"
                   FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold"
                   Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

        <!-- Bottom Buttons -->
        <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Orientation="Horizontal"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,12,0,0">
            <Button x:Name="ApplyButton" Content="적용" Style="{StaticResource PrimaryButton}"
                    Click="ApplyButton_Click" IsEnabled="False" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
            <Button Content="닫기" Style="{StaticResource WinButton}"
                    Click="CloseButton_Click"/>
        </StackPanel>

        <!-- Main Content -->
        <Grid>
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <!-- Row 0: Date Range + JIG Selection -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="1"
                    CornerRadius="8" Padding="16,12" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                <WrapPanel VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <StackPanel Margin="0,0,16,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="시작일" FontSize="11"
                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <DatePicker x:Name="StartDatePicker" Width="140"
                                    Background="#252525" Foreground="White"
                                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Margin="0,0,16,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="종료일" FontSize="11"
                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <DatePicker x:Name="EndDatePicker" Width="140"
                                    Background="#252525" Foreground="White"
                                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Margin="0,0,16,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="JIG 선택" FontSize="11"
                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox x:Name="JigComboBox" Width="120" Height="26"
                                  Background="#252525" Foreground="White"
                                  BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
                                  DisplayMemberPath="JigId"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Margin="0,0,16,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="샘플 수" FontSize="11"
                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox x:Name="SampleCountBox" Width="80" Height="26"
                                 Text="100" TextAlignment="Center"
                                 Background="#252525" Foreground="White"
                                 BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </WrapPanel>
            </Border>

            <!-- Row 1: Offset Settings -->
            <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="1"
                    CornerRadius="8" Padding="16,12" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="Amp Offset" FontSize="11"
                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox x:Name="AmpOffsetBox" Height="26" Text="10"
                                 TextAlignment="Center"
                                 Background="#252525" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
                                 BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Margin="4,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="Volt Offset" FontSize="11"
                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox x:Name="VoltOffsetBox" Height="26" Text="2"
                                 TextAlignment="Center"
                                 Background="#252525" Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"
                                 BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Margin="8,0,0,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="Flow Offset" FontSize="11"
                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox x:Name="FlowOffsetBox" Height="26" Text="3"
                                 TextAlignment="Center"
                                 Background="#252525" Foreground="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"
                                 BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- Row 2: Calculate Button -->
            <Button Grid.Row="2" Style="{StaticResource GoldButton}"
                    Height="34" Margin="0,0,0,10"
                    Click="CalculateButton_Click">
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <TextBlock Text="⚙" FontSize="14" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="계산" FontSize="13" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Button>

            <!-- Row 3: Result Table -->
            <Border Grid.Row="3" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="1"
                    CornerRadius="8" Padding="12">
                <DockPanel>
                    <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="계산 결과" FontSize="13" FontWeight="SemiBold"
                               Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                    <DataGrid x:Name="ResultGrid" AutoGenerateColumns="False"
                              CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False" IsReadOnly="True"
                              SelectionMode="Single" SelectionUnit="FullRow"
                              VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Point" Binding="{Binding Point}" Width="55"/>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="Amp Min" Width="*">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding AmpMin, StringFormat=F1}"
                                                   Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"/>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="Amp Max" Width="*">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding AmpMax, StringFormat=F1}"
                                                   Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"/>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="Volt Min" Width="*">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding VoltMin, StringFormat=F1}"
                                                   Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"/>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="Volt Max" Width="*">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding VoltMax, StringFormat=F1}"
                                                   Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"/>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="Flow Min" Width="*">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding FlowMin, StringFormat=F1}"
                                                   Foreground="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"/>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="Flow Max" Width="*">
                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding FlowMax, StringFormat=F1}"
                                                   Foreground="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"/>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                </DockPanel>
            </Border>
        </Grid>
    </DockPanel>
</Window>

input.content:
WeldMonitor V2

CO2 용접 품질 실시간 모니터링 시스템

.NET 8.0 WPF LS XGT PLC (FEnet) Arduino 1kHz ADC

시스템 개요

CO2 용접 공정의 전류(A), 전압(V), 유량(L/min)을 실시간 계측하여 용접 포인트별 OK/NG 판정을 자동 수행하는 품질 모니터링 시스템입니다.

⚡

실시간 계측

Arduino 1kHz 고속 ADC로 전류/전압/유량 동시 측정. EMA 필터 적용.

⚙

PLC 연동

LS XGT FEnet TCP 통신으로 JIG 감지, 작업 상태, 로봇 홈 위치 자동 제어.

✔

자동 판정

포인트별 기준값 비교로 OK/NG 판정. 평균/최대/최소 판정 타입 지원.

📊

데이터 관리

검사 결과 및 Raw 데이터 CSV 저장. 날짜/JIG별 검색 및 Excel 내보내기.

시스템 구성

Arduino 센서 데이터 수집부터 PLC 제어, 검사 판정, 결과 저장까지의 데이터 흐름

Arduino

1kHz ADC
전류/전압/유량

▶

Serial Parser

V2 Binary Protocol
Checksum 검증

▶

Inspection Engine

State Machine
포인트별 판정

▶

PLC (FEnet)

JIG 감지
NG/OK 출력

▶

CSV Storage

결과 + Raw Data
일자별 저장

화면 구성

총 8개의 기능 화면으로 구성된 용접 모니터링 시스템

Screen 01

메인 대시보드

실시간 용접 데이터를 한눈에 모니터링하는 메인 화면입니다.
  • 전류(A) / 전압(V) / 유량(L/min) 실시간 KPI 카드
  • 실시간 파형 차트 (5초 윈도우, 0.5초 간격 X축)
  • JIG 제품 이미지 + 포인트별 마커 표시 (OK: 녹색 / NG: 빨강)
  • 검사 결과 그리드 (포인트, 결과, AMP/VOLT/FLOW 통계)
  • Arduino / PLC 연결 상태 LED 표시
  • 검사 시작 / 중지 / 리셋 버튼
Screen 02

환경설정

시스템 통신 및 그래프 파라미터를 설정하는 화면입니다.
  • Arduino 시리얼 포트 / 프로토콜 버전 선택
  • AMP / VOLT / FLOW 그래프 범위 (Min/Max) 설정
  • EMA 필터 알파값 (0.1~1.0) 조정
  • LS XGT PLC FEnet 접속 정보 (IP/Port/주소/폴링)
Screen 03

시퀀스 관리

JIG별 용접 포인트의 검사 기준값을 관리하는 화면입니다.
  • 전류(A) / 전압(V) / 유량(L) 별 기준최소/기준최대/보정값 설정
  • 판정 타입 선택 (평균/최대/최소)
  • 앞/뒤 버림(%) — 불안정 구간 제외 설정
  • 포인트 추가/삭제, JIG 간 복사, 전체 적용 기능
Screen 04

이미지 설정

JIG 제품 이미지 위에 용접 포인트 마커를 배치하는 화면입니다.
  • 제품 이미지 불러오기 및 캔버스 표시
  • 포인트 마커 드래그 배치 / 마우스 휠 크기 조절
  • 포인트별 좌표(PosX/PosY) 및 크기(SizeX/SizeY) 편집
  • 크기 전체적용 — 선택한 마커 크기를 전체에 일괄 적용
Screen 05

검사 결과 검색

저장된 검사 이력을 날짜/결과별로 조회하는 화면입니다.
  • 시작일 / 종료일 범위 검색
  • 결과 필터 (ALL / OK / NG)
  • Excel 내보내기, 리포트 출력 기능
  • RAW DATA 조회 — 개별 검사의 1kHz 원시 데이터 확인
  • 하단 통계 표시 (Total / OK / NG / Yield%)
Screen 06

(설비/용접조건) 점검 체크시트

일상 점검 15개 항목을 기록하는 체크시트 화면입니다.
  • 15개 점검 항목: AIR 압력, 블록/핀, 클램프, 스패터 덮개, F/PROOF 센서 등
  • 주간/야간 교대별 점검 기록 (O / X / -)
  • 점검 사진 참고 표시 (항목별 실사 이미지)
  • 1~10일 / 11~20일 / 21~31일 기간 구분
  • PDF 내보내기 지원
Screen 07

PLC 신호 모니터

LS XGT PLC의 I/O 신호 상태를 실시간 모니터링하는 화면입니다.
  • PLC INPUT (읽기 전용): JIG 신호(LH/RH), 작업중, 용접중, 노즐청소, 홈복귀
  • PLC OUTPUT (강제 제어): PC Flicker, NG 신호, 일상점검 완료, 작업표준 확인
  • 각 출력 신호 ON/OFF 수동 제어 버튼
  • 포인트 카운터 값 실시간 표시
Screen 08

이벤트 로그

시스템 동작 이력을 카테고리별로 조회하는 로그 뷰어입니다.
  • 날짜 선택 (년/월/일) 후 로그 파일 조회
  • 카테고리 필터: UI, ENGINE, ARDUINO, PLC, JUDGE, RESULT, CONFIG, SYSTEM
  • 텍스트 검색 기능
  • 당일 로그 실시간 업데이트

시스템 사양

항목 사양
개발 플랫폼.NET 8.0 / WPF (Windows Presentation Foundation)
센서 수집Arduino (ATmega2560) — Timer1 1kHz 인터럽트, ADC Prescaler 32
통신 프로토콜Arduino: Serial V2 Binary (Checksum XOR) / PLC: LS XGT FEnet TCP
측정 항목용접 전류(A), 전압(V), 가스 유량(L/min)
검사 방식포인트별 기준값 비교 (평균/최대/최소 판정 타입)
JIG 관리최대 128개 JIG, JSON 기반 설정 저장
데이터 저장검사 결과 CSV + Raw 데이터 CSV (V1 호환)
차트 엔진LiveCharts2 (SkiaSharp) — 20fps 실시간 렌더링
해상도최대 1024 x 768 (대상 PC 기준)
운영체제Windows 10 / 11

WeldMonitor V2 — CO2 용접 품질 모니터링 시스템

import base64, os

images = {
    'img01': '01_MainWindow.png',
    'img02': '02_ConfigurationWindow.png',
    'img03': '03_SeqWindow.png',
    'img04': '04_ImageSetWindow.png',
    'img05': '05_SearchWindow.png',
    'img06': '06_DailyCheckWindow.png',
    'img07': '07_PlcMonitorWindow.png',
    'img08': '08_LogViewerWindow.png',
}

b64 = {}
for key, fname in images.items():
    with open(fname, 'rb') as f:
        b64[key] = base64.b64encode(f.read()).decode()

# Build script lines
lines = []
for key, data in b64.items():
    lines.append(f\"document.getElementById('{key}').src='data:image/png;base64,{data}';\")

script_content = '\n'.join(lines)

with open('index.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    html = f.read()

# Replace the placeholder script
old_script = '<!-- BASE64 images injected below -->\n<script>'
if old_script in html:
    idx = html.index(old_script)
    html = html[:idx] + '<script>\n' + script_content + '\n</script></body></html>'

with open('index.html', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(html)

print(f'Done. Size: {os.path.getsize(\"index.html\") / 1024:.0f} KB')
"

  • 앞/뒤 버림(%) — 불안정 구간 제외 설정
  • 포인트 추가/삭제, JIG 간 복사, 전체 적용 기능
Screen 04

이미지 설정

JIG 제품 이미지 위에 용접 포인트 마커를 배치하는 화면입니다.
  • 제품 이미지 불러오기 및 캔버스 표시
  • 포인트 마커 드래그 배치 / 마우스 휠 크기 조절
  • 포인트별 좌표(PosX/PosY) 및 크기(SizeX/SizeY) 편집
  • 크기 전체적용 — 선택한 마커 크기를 전체에 일괄 적용
Screen 05

검사 결과 검색

저장된 검사 이력을 날짜/결과별로 조회하는 화면입니다.
  • 시작일 / 종료일 범위 검색
  • 결과 필터 (ALL / OK / NG)
  • Excel 내보내기, 리포트 출력 기능
  • RAW DATA 조회 — 개별 검사의 1kHz 원시 데이터 확인
  • 하단 통계 표시 (Total / OK / NG / Yield%)
Screen 06

(설비/용접조건) 점검 체크시트

일상 점검 15개 항목을 기록하는 체크시트 화면입니다.
  • 15개 점검 항목: AIR 압력, 블록/핀, 클램프, 스패터 덮개, F/PROOF 센서 등
  • 주간/야간 교대별 점검 기록 (O / X / -)
  • 점검 사진 참고 표시 (항목별 실사 이미지)
  • 1~10일 / 11~20일 / 21~31일 기간 구분
  • PDF 내보내기 지원
Screen 07

PLC 신호 모니터

LS XGT PLC의 I/O 신호 상태를 실시간 모니터링하는 화면입니다.
  • PLC INPUT (읽기 전용): JIG 신호(LH/RH), 작업중, 용접중, 노즐청소, 홈복귀
  • PLC OUTPUT (강제 제어): PC Flicker, NG 신호, 일상점검 완료, 작업표준 확인
  • 각 출력 신호 ON/OFF 수동 제어 버튼
  • 포인트 카운터 값 실시간 표시
Screen 08

이벤트 로그

시스템 동작 이력을 카테고리별로 조회하는 로그 뷰어입니다.
  • 날짜 선택 (년/월/일) 후 로그 파일 조회
  • 카테고리 필터: UI, ENGINE, ARDUINO, PLC, JUDGE, RESULT, CONFIG, SYSTEM
  • 텍스트 검색 기능
